batches.title: Soft-Boiled Eggs (3 eggs for Mon–Wed–Fri–Sun breakfasts, 1 extra)
steps: Bring pot of water to boil.
Gently place 4 large eggs in boiling water.
Cook for exactly 6 minutes for soft-boiled (runny yolk, set white).
Transfer immediately to ice bath with cold water.
Cool for 3 minutes.
Store in shell in fridge in sealed container.

day_of_assembly.Monday: Breakfast — Soft-Boiled Egg with Sourdough, Goat Cheese & Strawberries: Remove 1 egg from shell, place in egg cup. Toast 40g sourdough, spread 30g goat cheese, serve with strawberries.
day_of_assembly.Wednesday: Breakfast — Poached Egg with Whole-Grain Sourdough, Avocado & Blueberries: Note: Use fresh poached egg (not batched). Toast sourdough, poach fresh egg 3 min, top with avocado.
day_of_assembly.Thursday: Breakfast — Soft-Boiled Egg with Sourdough, Goat Cheese & Strawberries: Remove 1 egg from shell, place in egg cup. Toast 40g sourdough, spread 30g goat cheese, serve with strawberries.
day_of_assembly.Friday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (eggs cooked is only safe ~4 day(s); this is day 5).
day_of_assembly.Sunday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (eggs cooked is only safe ~4 day(s); this is day 7).

storage.safety_note: Hard-boiled eggs: 1 week in shell, 5 days peeled in water. Scrambled/cooked dishes: 3–4 days.

batches.title: Grilled Chicken Breast, Stir-Fried Chicken, Herb-Roasted Chicken Thighs, plus Roasted Vegetables (Mediterranean & Asian)
steps: PAT 600g chicken breast dry. Season with salt, pepper, dried oregano.
Heat grill or large skillet to medium-high. Grill chicken for 6–7 min per side until internal temp reaches 65°C.
Cool on cutting board; slice into strips.
Cut 600g chicken breast into 2cm dice. Marinate with 2tbsp soy sauce, 1tbsp ginger (minced), 2 cloves garlic (minced), 1tsp sesame oil, salt, pepper for 2 hrs (or prep morning-of if time-limited).
ROAST (on two trays at 200°C, 20 min each):
Tray 1: 400g zucchini (diced) + 300g cherry tomatoes with 2tsp olive oil, minced garlic, salt, pepper, dried thyme.
Tray 2: 400g zucchini (cubed) + 400g sweet potato (cubed) with 3tsp olive oil, garlic, salt. Roast 20 min until tender.
Cool all roasted vegetables and store separately.
PAT 600g chicken thighs dry. Season with salt, pepper, dried rosemary, thyme.
Roast thighs skin-side up at 200°C for 25 min until internal temp reaches 75°C.
Cool and store.

day_of_assembly.Monday: Lunch — Mediterranean Grilled Chicken with Roasted Vegetables & Couscous: Portion grilled chicken (Diego 200g, Diana 150g) and Mediterranean roasted veg (Diego 200g, Diana 150g). Plate with 80g Diego / 60g Diana cooked couscous and lemon juice.
day_of_assembly.Tuesday: Lunch — Asian Chicken Stir-Fry with Bok Choy, Sesame & Brown Rice: Reheat diced marinated chicken (Diego 200g, Diana 150g) in wok with 600g bok choy, 1tsp sesame oil, soy sauce, sesame seeds for 3 min. Serve with brown rice (Diego 100g, Diana 75g cooked).
day_of_assembly.Wednesday: Dinner — Herb-Roasted Chicken with Roasted Zucchini & Sweet Potato: Reheat thigh portion (Diego 220g, Diana 170g). Reheat sweet potato mix (Diego 280g, Diana 210g). Plate and serve.
day_of_assembly.Thursday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (poultry is only safe ~3 day(s); this is day 4).
day_of_assembly.Saturday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (poultry is only safe ~3 day(s); this is day 6).

storage.safety_note: Cool quickly; never leave poultry at room temp > 2 h. Reheat to 74 °C through.

batches.title: Portioned Greek Yogurt (0% Fat)
steps: Open 1.5kg Greek yogurt (0% fat).
Portion into individual 180g servings (Diego) and 140g servings (Diana) in labeled glass or plastic containers.
Stack in fridge.

day_of_assembly.Monday: Pm Snack — Greek Yogurt with Walnuts: Spoon 180g Diego / 140g Diana portion into bowl. Top with 20g Diego / 15g Diana raw walnuts.
day_of_assembly.Tuesday: Pm Snack — Greek Yogurt with Almonds: Spoon 180g Diego / 140g Diana portion into bowl. Top with 20g Diego / 15g Diana raw almonds.
day_of_assembly.Wednesday: Pm Snack — Greek Yogurt with Walnuts: Spoon 180g Diego / 140g Diana portion into bowl. Top with 20g Diego / 15g Diana raw walnuts.
day_of_assembly.Thursday: Pm Snack — Greek Yogurt with Almonds: Spoon 180g Diego / 140g Diana portion into bowl. Top with 20g Diego / 15g Diana raw almonds.
day_of_assembly.Friday: Pm Snack — Greek Yogurt with Walnuts: Spoon 180g Diego / 140g Diana portion into bowl. Top with 20g Diego / 15g Diana raw walnuts.
day_of_assembly.Saturday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (dairy is only safe ~5 day(s); this is day 6).
day_of_assembly.Sunday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (dairy is only safe ~5 day(s); this is day 7).

storage.container: sealed original packaging or airtight container
storage.safety_note: Check use-by date on packaging. Opened yogurt: 5–7 days.

batches.title: Roasted Green Beans & Boiled New Potatoes
steps: ROASTED GREEN BEANS: Trim 500g fresh green beans. Toss with 2tsp olive oil, 3 cloves garlic (minced), salt, pepper.
Spread on baking tray. Roast at 200°C for 15 min until tender and light golden.
Cool and store in sealed container.
BOILED NEW POTATOES: Wash 600g new potatoes. Halve any large ones to even size.
Bring pot of salted water to boil. Add potatoes. Cook 12–15 min until fork-tender.
Drain and cool. Store in sealed container.

day_of_assembly.Monday: Dinner — Pan-Seared White Fish with Roasted Green Beans & New Potatoes: Pan-sear fresh fish fillet (180g Diego / 140g Diana) with 1tsp olive oil until 60°C internal. Plate with portions of roasted green beans (180g Diego / 140g Diana) and boiled potatoes (150g Diego / 110g Diana). Serve with lemon wedge.
day_of_assembly.Thursday: Dinner — Pan-Seared Salmon with Sesame Cucumber Salad & New Potatoes: Pan-sear fresh salmon fillet (190g Diego / 150g Diana) skin-side down with 1tsp olive oil until 60°C. Plate with cucumber salad (200g tossed with rice vinegar, sesame oil, sesame seeds) and boiled potatoes (150g Diego / 110g Diana).
day_of_assembly.Sunday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (vegetables cooked is only safe ~4 day(s); this is day 7).

storage.safety_note: Cooked vegetables store well. Roasted veg can be eaten cold in salads.

batches.title: Beef & Herb Meatballs in Tomato Sauce with Whole-Grain Pasta
steps: Mix in bowl: 500g lean ground beef, 30g whole-grain breadcrumbs, 1 large egg, 3 cloves garlic (minced), salt, pepper, 15g fresh parsley (chopped).
Form mixture into 20 equal balls (about 30g each).
Place on baking tray lined with parchment.
Bake at 200°C for 15 min until internal temp reaches 70°C.
SAUCE: Heat 2tsp olive oil in large pot. Add 400ml tomato passata (Mutti / Pommodoro), 2 cloves garlic (minced), 1tsp dried basil, salt, pepper.
Simmer 10 min on low.
Add cooled meatballs to sauce. Simmer together 5 min.
Cool and store in sealed container (meatballs in sauce).
PASTA: Cook 250g dry whole-grain pasta per package directions until al dente. Drain and cool. Store separately (or toss lightly with 1tsp olive oil to prevent sticking).
yields: 20 cooked beef meatballs in tomato sauce (~600g total)

day_of_assembly.Tuesday: Dinner — Baked Beef & Herb Meatballs with Tomato Sauce & Whole-Grain Pasta: Reheat meatball portion (Diego 5 balls = 150g, Diana 4 balls = 120g) in sauce. Reheat pasta (Diego 120g, Diana 90g cooked). Combine on plate. Top with 10g parmesan shreds.
day_of_assembly.Friday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (red meat is only safe ~3 day(s); this is day 5).

storage.safety_note: Store in coldest part of fridge. Reheat to 74 °C before serving.

batches.title: Tuna & Chickpea Salad with Roasted Bell Peppers
steps: ROASTED PEPPERS: Slice 500g red bell peppers lengthwise into flat pieces or wide strips.
Toss with 2tsp olive oil, salt, pepper.
Roast on baking tray at 200°C for 20 min until tender and edges begin to caramelize.
Cool and slice into smaller pieces or strips. Store in sealed container.
TUNA & CHICKPEA MIX: Drain 3 cans (240g net) tuna in water, flake into bowl.
Drain 1 can (250g) canned chickpeas, add to tuna.
Add roasted pepper pieces (all of them).
Mince 2 cloves garlic and add.
Drizzle with 2tsp olive oil and 1tbsp fresh lemon juice. Add salt, pepper.
Stir gently to combine. Store in sealed container.
GREENS: Wash and tear 300g mixed salad greens (romaine, spinach, or mixed). Store separately in sealed bag or container.

day_of_assembly.Wednesday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (fish seafood is only safe ~2 day(s); this is day 3).
day_of_assembly.Sunday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (fish seafood is only safe ~2 day(s); this is day 7).

storage.container: airtight container on ice or coldest shelf
storage.safety_note: Fish spoils fast. Use within 2 days; 1 day is safer. Reheat to 74 °C.

batches.title: Seasoned Shredded Chicken for Mexican Bowl + Cooked Brown Rice + Black Beans + Corn + Lime Crema
steps: Dice 600g chicken breast into 2cm pieces.
Season with 1tsp cumin, 0.5tsp chilli powder, 3 cloves garlic (minced), 2tbsp fresh lime juice, salt, pepper.
Heat 2tsp olive oil in large skillet over medium-high. Pan-fry chicken 8–10 min, stirring often, until internal temp reaches 70°C.
Shred into smaller pieces using two forks or knives. Cool and store.
RICE: Cook 200g dry brown rice per package. Cool and store separately.
BEANS: Drain 1 can (250g) black beans. Warm gently in pot with 1 clove garlic (minced) and salt, 2 min. Cool and store.
CORN: Thaw 200g frozen corn kernels at room temperature. Store in sealed container.
LIME CREMA: Whisk 80g Greek yogurt (0%) with juice of 1 lime (≈1tbsp), pinch cumin, salt, pepper until smooth. Store in sealed container.

day_of_assembly.Friday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (poultry is only safe ~3 day(s); this is day 5).

storage.safety_note: Cool quickly; never leave poultry at room temp > 2 h. Reheat to 74 °C through.
